# ForexGoldEA

> ForexGoldEA is an automated XAUUSD (gold) trading expert advisor (EA) for MetaTrader 4 and MetaTrader 5, built by BBFxAi LLC (operating since 2016). The EA is free for traders who register through our partner broker link. This site publishes honest, educational guides about gold trading, expert advisors, prop firms, and automated-trading risk.

Key facts:
- Product: ForexGoldEA — a gold (XAU/USD) expert advisor for MT4/MT5
- Company: BBFxAi LLC, since 2016
- Pricing: free with partner broker registration
- Contact: Telegram bot https://t.me/xauusdrobot_bot · community https://t.me/BBFxAi_Community
- Verified performance tracking: https://www.myfxbook.com/members/BBFx_Ai/bbfxai-100-usd/12092687
- Important: trading gold on margin is high risk; nothing on this site is financial advice, and results are never guaranteed.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://forexgoldea.com/): what ForexGoldEA is, features, free download steps, FAQ
- [Blog](https://forexgoldea.com/blog.html): all guides
- [About](https://forexgoldea.com/about.html): company and contact details
